name: Sea Limited
sector: SEA tech — e-commerce (Shopee), digital entertainment (Garena), fintech (Monee)

evidence.title: Shopee GMV up 26% YoY in SEA; first full-year group profit
Garena Free Fire bookings stabilise after two-year decline
Monee (SeaMoney) loan book +60% YoY, NPLs steady at 1.2%
TikTok Shop intensifies price competition in Indonesia

earnings_video.title: Sea Ltd Q4 FY25 Earnings Call
earnings_video.quote: Shopee reached positive adjusted EBITDA across every market, and we expect take-rate expansion to continue into FY26.

analyst_steps.query: Sea Limited Q4 FY25 results revenue margin
analyst_steps.observation: Revenue $4.9B in Q4, group net profit positive for the first full year
Mgmt guides continued take-rate expansion; logistics cost per order down 11%

analyst_steps.query: Garena Free Fire DAU bookings 2025 trend
analyst_steps.observation: Bookings stabilising; DAU re-accelerated in India relaunch

analyst_steps.query: TikTok Shop Indonesia competition Shopee share
analyst_steps.observation: Competition real but Shopee defended share via Shopee Live + lower fees

thesis.summary: Sea has hit a profitability inflection: Shopee is EBITDA-positive across all markets while Monee compounds at 60%+ with stable credit quality. Garena is no longer a drag. The market is still pricing peak-competition fears, leaving asymmetric upside as group margins expand.
risks: Garena gaming revenue secular decline if Free Fire re-engagement stalls
TikTok Shop price competition compresses Shopee take-rate in Indonesia
FX translation risk across SEA currencies vs USD reporting
